race.comment: DINGLE GREY (2) back in grade where she sprinted quickly to defeat inferior opposition over 1200m at Quirindi in good time. Goes up a couple of grades today and looks hard to stop in a winnable race. TAKE THE JACKPOT (8) came out of a very fast race second-up when he gripped on to secure third over 1200m at Quirindi. Gets map favours here and should be at his top for this. Leading contender. ANDALE ANDALE (3) outclassed in town with a battling ninth over 1400m at Randwick in Highway class. Kept fresh for this and can bounce back with the visors going on. PATRIOTICINTENTION (4) made a mess of his rivals when clearing out for a dominant victory over 1206m at Port Macquarie in the heavy (10) going. Gets in light again with the claim and stays in the mix.
